_comment: This is an example file. Question bank files must NOT start with underscore. Create files like 'chapter-01.json', 'chapter-05.json', etc.
title: Developing Airmen

questions.question: What is the primary purpose of the Enlisted Force Structure?
options: Describe the roles, responsibilities, and expectations of each enlisted rank

questions.question: Which of the following best describes the role of a Staff Sergeant (E-5)?
options: Flight-level manager responsible for mission execution

questions.question: What core value emphasizes putting the needs of the nation, the Air Force, and subordinates before your own?
